trends.name: Stovepipe Jeans
trends.viral_hook: Straight-cut denim from hip to hem making a major comeback — Y2K fashion revival drives TikTok styling videos with thrift hauls, outfit-of-the-day formats, and celebrity-inspired looks.
trends.notes: Fashion trend — was miscategorised as 'gadgets' by scanner heuristics, corrected to 'fashion'. 40.5K volume at +800% makes this the highest-volume fresh trend. Multiple retailers, good affiliate angle with styling guides.

trends.name: Milky Moisturizer (Snow Mushroom Skincare)
trends.viral_hook: Korean skincare meets Snow Mushroom, Hyaluronic Acid, and Shea Butter — 'glass skin' hydration trend. Milky texture application videos and transformation content driving engagement across beauty community.
trends.notes: Available at Target, Sephora, Walmart — strong retail presence. Snow Mushroom ingredient is the hook. $15-35 price point. Scanner correctly categorised as 'beauty' (keyword heuristic fix working).

trends.name: Weight Loss Peptides (GLP-1 Natural Alternative)
trends.viral_hook: Natural alternative to Ozempic/Wegovy — GLP-1 mimicking peptides for appetite control and glucose metabolism. 'Natural Ozempic' trend continues to drive massive search volume. Before/after transformation content building credibility.
trends.notes: 33.1K volume at +900% — maintaining strong growth week-over-week. The peptide sub-niche expanding. $30-80/month recurring purchase potential.

trends.name: Epitalon (Anti-Aging Peptide)
trends.viral_hook: Synthetic peptide for telomerase production and anti-aging — longevity biohacking trend. Scientific curiosity + 'biological age reversal' claims driving interest in the biohacker and longevity communities.
trends.notes: Niche supplement play at 27.1K volume. More research/science-oriented than GLP-1 peptides. $40-100/cycle. May be harder to affiliate due to supplement regulation.

trends.name: Mini LED Projector
trends.viral_hook: Turn your bedroom wall into a movie theatre — compact, affordable, perfect for small spaces. Summer outdoor movie season now at peak. Room transformation and setup videos drive sales.
trends.notes: Late May through June is peak outdoor movie season. $50-150 price point = good commissions.

trends.name: Neck Fan (Portable Wearable)
trends.viral_hook: Hands-free personal fan — summer essential for commuting, outdoor work, and events. Dual-blade design with neckband form factor. 'What's in my bag' and 'summer essentials' content driving discovery.
trends.notes: Seasonal peak — late May timing perfect for summer content. $15-40 price point, high volume.

trends.name: Posture Corrector Device
trends.viral_hook: Before/after transformations showing posture improvement for remote workers. 'Worn for 30 days — what changed' format continues to perform. WFH permanence driving sustained demand.
trends.engagement_estimate: 3.1M+ views, strong comment engagement across TikTok
trends.notes: Evergreen performer. Broad demographic appeal — office workers, gamers, elderly.

trends.name: Pet Hair Remover (ChomChom-style)
trends.viral_hook: Satisfying before/after of pet hair removal from furniture. 'Look how much hair this removed' reveal format drives insane share rates. Spring shedding season at peak.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1M+ views, high share rate across pet communities
trends.notes: Spring shedding season running through June. Reusable design. Broad appeal across pet owners.

trends.name: LED Strip Lights (Smart RGBIC)
trends.viral_hook: Room transformation videos — gaming setups, bedroom aesthetics, music-synced lighting displays. 'TikTok made me buy it' category leader. Consistent viral format year-round.
trends.engagement_estimate: 1.5M+ views, consistent high volume across TikTok
trends.notes: Year-round evergreen. Low price ($10-30) but broad appeal and high volume.

source_summary: Scanned via CloakBrowser (stealth Chromium): ExplodingTopics.com (6 potential trend signals detected, 5 matched/categorized). Dropped: Therapeutic Plasma Exchange (medical procedure — no affiliate potential). Added Lovescape (AI adult content — excluded as not relevant for ecommerce audience). Combined with 5 established evergreen products (Mini LED Projector, Neck Fan, Posture Corrector, Pet Hair Remover, LED Strip Lights). Stovepipe Jeans (40.5K, +800%) and Weight Loss Peptides (33.1K, +900%) are the highest-volume fresh trends this cycle. Summer seasonal products (neck fan, mini projector) maintaining peak. Peptide category shows 2 strong entries holding +900% growth from last cycle. Scanner keyword heuristics correctly categorised Milky Moisturizer as 'beauty' this run — the 2026-05-27 patch held. Stovepipe Jeans was miscategorised as 'gadgets' — corrected to 'fashion' in final output.
